uiBuilder.label: Risk Survey Table
uiBuilder.description: A risk-survey results table driven by columns/rows JSON: factor, score badge (low/medium/high), AI-sentiment bullets, and a chevron or per-row action buttons. Handles loading/empty/error states. Composes now-icon + now-button.

properties.name: columnsJson
properties.label: Columns
properties.description: JSON array of column definitions. Leave empty for the default factor / score / sentiments columns.

properties.name: rowsJson
properties.label: Rows data
properties.description: Rows as a JSON array, or a wrapper object ({loading}|{error}|{data|rows|items}). Drives the loading / empty / error states.

properties.name: showChevron
properties.label: Show chevron
properties.description: Show a chevron affordance at the end of each row (hidden when action buttons are enabled).

properties.name: enableHref
properties.label: Enable row href
properties.description: When on, clicking a row opens the URL in the href key instead of emitting the row-clicked event.

properties.name: hrefKey
properties.label: Href key
properties.description: Row property holding the URL to open when Enable row href is on.

properties.name: openInNewWindow
properties.label: Open in new window
properties.description: Open the href in a new window/tab.

properties.name: enableActionButtons
properties.label: Enable action buttons
properties.description: When on, renders per-row action buttons (from Action buttons JSON) instead of a clickable row + chevron.

properties.name: actionButtonsJson
properties.label: Action buttons
properties.description: JSON array of up to 3 buttons: { actionKey, label, variant }. variant is primary or secondary.

actions.name: RISK_SURVEY_ROW_CLICKED
actions.label: Row clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks a row (when action buttons and href are off).

actions.name: RISK_SURVEY_CONTEXT_BUTTON_CLICKED
actions.label: Action button clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks a per-row action button.
